taxonomy: Amellus discoideus is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it within the order Asterales and the subclass Rosidae. The genus Amellus is further grouped within the tribe Cardueae. Amellus discoideus is native to the southwestern part of the Western Cape province in South Africa. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants in the Asteraceae family.
